trademark-registration.label: What is the exact brand name/logo you want to register?
What goods/services does your brand cover (brief description)?
Are you already using the trademark in business (Yes/No + since when)?
Do you want to register a word mark, logo, or both?
Have you checked for similar trademarks already (Yes/No)?

trademark-objection.label: What is your trademark application number?
What is the objection reason mentioned in the examination report?
By when do you need to file the objection reply (date if known)?
Do you have proof of trademark usage (Yes/No)?
Do you have documents like invoices/ads showing usage (Yes/No)?
Have you already submitted any reply earlier (Yes/No)?

trademark-opposition.label: What is the trademark application number under opposition?
Who has filed the opposition (if known)?
What are the grounds mentioned in the opposition notice?
When is the deadline to file counter statement?
Do you have evidence of prior use (Yes/No)?
Do you need full representation for hearings (Yes/No)?

trademark-renewal.label: What is your registered trademark number?
What is the expiry date of the trademark (approximate)?
Has there been any change in ownership details (Yes/No)?
Is the trademark actively in use (Yes/No)?
Has the renewal deadline already passed (Yes/No)?
Do you have registration certificate copy (Yes/No)?

copyright-registration.label: What type of work do you want to copyright (software, content, music, etc.)?
Who is the original author/creator of the work?
Is the work published or unpublished (brief)?
Do you have a copy of the work ready for submission (Yes/No)?
When was the work created (approximate date)?

patent-registration.label: Describe your invention in simple terms (what problem it solves)?
Have you checked if similar inventions already exist (Yes/No)?
What stage is your invention at (idea/prototype/market-ready)?
Who are the inventors (names and count)?
Do you want patent protection only in India or internationally?

design-registration.label: What product design do you want to register (brief)?
Is the design new and not disclosed publicly (Yes/No)?
Do you have clear images/drawings of the design (Yes/No)?
What type of article/product uses this design?
Has the design been published or used before (Yes/No)?

logo-designing.label: What is your brand/company name for the logo?
What style do you prefer (modern/minimal/traditional, etc.)?
Do you have preferred colors or themes (Yes/No + brief)?
Do you have any reference logos you like (Yes/No)?
Where will the logo be used (website, packaging, social media, etc.)?
